name: Azelaic Acid
description: A multi-functional acid that fights acne, reduces redness, and brightens skin with minimal irritation.
scientificSummary: A naturally occurring dicarboxylic acid with proven antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and anti-keratinizing properties.
mechanismOfAction: Inhibits tyrosinase activity to reduce pigment, and disrupts bacterial protein synthesis to fight acne-causing bacteria.

seo.title: Azelaic Acid - Multi-Action Acne & Redness Treatment | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover how Azelaic Acid targets acne, rosacea, and hyperpigmentation all at once.
